identificationModule.briefTitle: A Phase II Clinical Trial of HRS-1893 in the Treatment of Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction
identificationModule.officialTitle: A Multicenter, Randomized, Double-blind, Placebo-controlled Phase II Clinical Trial on the Efficacy and Safety of HRS-1893 in the Treatment of Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction

descriptionModule.briefSummary: This study aims to evaluate the safety and tolerability of HRS-1893 in subjects with heart failure with preserved ejection fraction.

conditions: Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction

primaryOutcomes.measure: Incidence and severity of adverse events (AEs).
primaryOutcomes.description: In heart failure patients with preserved ejection fraction after treatment with HRS-1893.

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Change from baseline in N-terminal pro B-type natriuretic peptide (NT-proBNP).
secondaryOutcomes.description: In heart failure patients with preserved ejection fraction after treatment with HRS-1893.

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Change from baseline in Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire-Clinical Summary Score (KCCQ-CSS).
secondaryOutcomes.description: In heart failure patients with preserved ejection fraction after treatment with HRS-1893.

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Proportion of heart failure patients with preserved ejection fraction with an improvement of ≥1 NYHA functional class from baseline.
secondaryOutcomes.description: In heart failure patients with preserved ejection fraction after treatment with HRS-1893.

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Change from baseline in total distance walked during the six-minute walk test (6MWT).
secondaryOutcomes.description: In heart failure patients with preserved ejection fraction after treatment with HRS-1893.

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Change from baseline in resting left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF).
secondaryOutcomes.description: In heart failure patients with preserved ejection fraction after treatment with HRS-1893.
In heart failure patients with preserved ejection fraction after treatment with HRS-1893.

locations.facility: Zhongshan Hospital Affiliated to Fudan University
